_note: Providers that appear in mental-health care but do NOT bill MBS items in their own right. Used to give an explicit, grounded answer rather than silently returning nothing. NOT authoritative — verify funding arrangements before production use. Keep aliases lowercase.

providers.summary: Credentialed mental health nurses do not have MBS item numbers they can claim in their own right.
providers.funding: Their services are funded through Primary Health Network (PHN) commissioned programs — the former Mental Health Nurse Incentive Program (MHNIP), folded into PHN commissioning in 2016 — not fee-for-service MBS.
providers.note: A mental health nurse may deliver care under an MBS-billing provider (e.g. a GP or psychiatrist), but the MBS claim is made by that provider, not the nurse.
